_doc: The contract between the detect subagent, the page cache (.deai/page-NN.json), the review endpoint, and the review UI. The subagent RETURNS an object of this shape. The UI reads it and POSTs back the same object with each flag's `decision` filled in.

pageDetect.description: Page-level deterministic stats from stats.mjs (the detect AXIS, model-free).

span.description: the EXACT verbatim text flagged — must match the page char-for-char so the UI can locate + the fixer can find/replace

context.description: short surrounding text for display, optional

voice.description: how OFF-the-author's-voice this span reads (Claude's judgment vs VOICE.md)

detect.description: this span's contribution to statistical AI-likelihood

fix.description: suggested replacement in the author's voice — smallest change that removes the tell; for an additive 'under-felt' flag, the original line reworked/extended with an in-voice emotional beat (fix LONGER than span)

additive.description: true only for 'under-felt' enrichment suggestions where the fix ADDS an in-voice emotional beat rather than removing a tell. The UI labels these as enrich, not fix.

editText.description: present only when decision='edit' — the author's own replacement, used instead of `fix`
